arts.ttl: Man City keen on Spurs' Udogie - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester City are interested in signing Tottenham's Destiny Udogie and a host of Premier League clubs want Bournemouth's Dean Huijsen.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans are making a clear point about Destiny Udogie’s performance vs Frankfurt after links to Man City
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur fans have been discussing the performance of Destiny Udogie against Eintracht Frankfurt as the Italian returned to the starting line-up. Ange Postecoglou’s team...

arts.ttl: Man City unearth rising star in Youth Cup final run - and he's already attracting transfer glances
arts.sum: Manchester City beat Watford 1-0 in the Youth Cup semi-final to book a date with Aston Villa in the final.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace Want to Sign 'Extraordinary' Star on Free Transfer
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are now eyeing a move to sign an "extraordinary" free agent for Oliver Glasner.

arts.ttl: Liverpool complete Man City swoop that could have huge impact on both clubs
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to appoint Laurie Shaw as their new chief scientist, with the Scot currently on gardening leave after leaving his role as director of football data at the City Football Group

arts.ttl: Man City 'add Tottenham defender to their list of summer targets' as Pep Guardiola steps up squad rebuild plans
arts.sum: The start of City's squad rebuild was brought forward to the winter, with Pep Guardiola 's side signing Omar Marmoush, Abdukodir Khusanov, Nico Gonzalez and Vitor Reis in January.

arts.ttl: Man City learn new timeline for 115 Premier League charges verdict
arts.sum: Manchester City are still waiting on the verdict of their long-running legal battle with the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man City's 130 charges verdict given new date after Pep Guardiola prediction
arts.sum: A verdict on Manchester City's 130 charges may not be reached until the start of next season, following an independent hearing into allegations that the club breached financial fair play rules

arts.ttl: Man City 115 charges: Fresh timeline emerges for verdict from Premier League 'trial of the century'
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly unlikely to learn the outcome of the hearing into its 115 charges of alleged Premier League financial rule breaches until after the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Latest from Germany: Cesc Fabregas now in picture with Crystal Palace and Sheffield Wednesday managers for RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Cesc Fabregas has been added to RB Leipzig’s list of potential managerial appointments alongside Sheffield Wednesday’s Danny Rohl and Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner. That’s according to journalist Philipp Hinze, who reports that the former Premier League star, currently manager at Como, now finds himself on the list at the German side.
